summary: A Python-wrapped technical context for a fast-moving Lean repository. Stable content was reduced to target-erasure diagnostics, target-preserving Ursell summation, rooted leaf moments, an explicit rate budget, a polymer-expansion domain and reusable research moves; transient status and speculative accelerators were excluded.

promoted.title: Free marked sums erase target information
promoted.rationale: The exact factorization removes the target and tree from the majorant.

promoted.title: Extract target decay before overcounting
promoted.rationale: The exact union and tree must remain visible until metric stitching has produced the target factor.

promoted.title: Rooted leaf elimination with factorial moments
promoted.rationale: The conditional fixed-tree bound follows from rooted and parent-child moment hypotheses by bottom-up elimination.

promoted.title: Appendix-F rate split and geometric endpoint
promoted.rationale: The rate identity and conditional geometric-series algebra are explicit, while source constants remain separate.

promoted.title: Polymer cluster expansions as a reusable domain
promoted.rationale: Mayer, Ursell, KP, exact-union fibers and tree moments form a reusable mathematical domain.

promoted.title: Progress requires a real hypothesis reduction
promoted.rationale: The adversarial checklist tracks eliminated assumptions, retained data and the downstream consumer.

promoted.title: Gauge activity production is a separate analytic chain
promoted.rationale: The target-sensitive second gas does not supply coercivity, covariance, collars, large fields or the R-operation.

quarantined.title: Quantitative BV-RG retract
quarantined.rationale: No concrete local homotopy or RG-compatible bound is supplied.

quarantined.title: Mayer-Ward transgression
quarantined.rationale: No finite nonlinear support-preserving identity is proved.

quarantined.title: Berezin matrix-tree encoding
quarantined.rationale: No representation preserving target, root and positive majorant is supplied.

quarantined.title: Local kernel spectral-radius criterion
quarantined.rationale: The refinement lacks a defined operator and comparison theorem.

quarantined.title: Dimension threshold laboratory
quarantined.rationale: The numerical thresholds lack a reproducible formula.

quarantined.title: Direct covariance shortcut
quarantined.rationale: The physical gauge operator, large fields and R-operation remain absent.

quarantined.title: Space-scale polymer carrier
quarantined.rationale: It adds multiscale infrastructure before the single-scale theorem is closed.

discarded.reason: The outer code only writes the embedded context and carries no mathematical content.
Checkpoint-specific proved/open inventories and commit campaigns became obsolete as the external repository evolved.
Ward, Gaussian, coercivity, physical-scaling and generic gauge-producer material was already curated from the previous source.
Copy-paste prompts, response templates and exact commit choreography are transient workflow snapshots.
Portal, wormhole, negative-energy and religious or numerological metaphors are not mathematical evidence.

verification_queue.request: Check fixed-union tree expressions, leaf moments, marker normalization, child-factorial sums and the factor four against primary Dimock sources.
verification_queue.reason: The source provides exact-looking constants without a complete primary transcription.

verification_queue.request: Identify whether the CMP116 object is raw H, connected K, integrated K-sharp or another intermediate and transcribe its norm and support.
verification_queue.reason: The first activity must be typed before it can feed the second gas.

verification_queue.request: Determine whether the source KP tilt uses active-skeleton or full-target cardinality and prove the comparison.
verification_queue.reason: The modified metric can discount holes.

verification_queue.request: Transcribe fluctuation and spectator integration order with measurability and integrability assumptions.
verification_queue.reason: Totalized integrals do not justify Fubini.

verification_queue.request: Recover and reproduce the formula behind the quoted dimension thresholds.
